evals.name: session-start-loads-identity
evals.prompt: Load the brain skill and start a new session. Run session.sh start to verify it loads identity files correctly.
evals.expected_output: Should display AI.md and you.md content from identity layer

evals.name: save-conversation
evals.prompt: Save a conversation using append-history.sh with automatic filename generation.
evals.expected_output: File should be created in conversation/history/ with auto-generated name

evals.name: search-memory
evals.prompt: Search memory for keyword 'swift' using recall.sh
evals.expected_output: Should show matching results from identity, conversation, archive, or deeper layers

evals.name: create-deeper-memory
evals.prompt: Create a new project memory called 'test-project' using write-memory.sh project command
evals.expected_output: File should be created in deeper/projects/test-project.md

evals.name: memory-status
evals.expected_output: Should show identity files, conversation count, archive count, deeper count

evals.name: write-identity
evals.prompt: Update AI.md with new lesson using write-memory.sh ai command
evals.expected_output: File should be updated with new content

evals.name: reflection-check
evals.prompt: Run reflection.sh check to see if reflection is needed
evals.expected_output: Should return OK or REFLECTION_NEEDED based on conversation count

evals.name: write-user-profile
evals.prompt: Update user profile using write-memory.sh you command
evals.expected_output: File should be created/updated in identity/you.md
